_comment: This is the single source of truth for the directory. Each entry is one bloc. To add an approved submission, append an object to the 'blocs' array and commit. Keep it valid JSON (watch trailing commas).

_schema.name: Display name of the bloc (required)
_schema.region: Top-level region grouping, e.g. 'USA – West', 'Canada', 'United Kingdom' (required)
_schema.location: Sub-location shown as a tag, e.g. 'CA (California)' or 'London' (optional)
_schema.description: Short blurb about what they offer (optional)
_schema.status: Operational status. One of: active, forming, inactive (optional, defaults to active)
_schema.type: Type of org. One of: mask-bloc, clean-air, advocacy, care-collective, student-led, charity (optional, defaults to mask-bloc)
_schema.lat: Latitude as a number, used for the map (required)
_schema.lng: Longitude as a number, used for the map (required)

blocs.location: Upper Manhattan, New York City, NY (New York)
blocs.description: We offer free rapid tests and high-quality masks (KF94, KN95, N95, N99, etc.). Currently, the best way to reach us is via Facebook or Instagram, though you can also reach out via email (wahiinwoodmaskbloc@gmail.com) or check out our website at bit.ly/whinymaskbloc.

blocs.description: free masks, often but not always tests, sometimes local connections. talk to us about starting your own mutual aid! Map point is arbitrary, we serve the entire northeastern US either by local distribution or mail.

blocs.description: We offer free high quality respirators which can requested via our Instagram, email or mask request form and are provided via drop off, post, pick up or at our meet ups.

blocs.name: Portugal Mask Bloc
blocs.description: We have free N95s, KN95s, a couple of Readimasks, and some kids sized KN95s. Additonally, we have one AirFanta 4Lite and one AirFanta 3Pro available to rent out as well. *We can also ship masks to other countries in Europe, for that we just ask that you cover the shipping cost please.

blocs.name: Mask Block Nantes
blocs.description: Masques FFP2 gratuits, tests covid équivalent PCR (PlusLife).

blocs.description: Collective distributing free masks, DIY air purifiers, and other clean air and safety supplies in the San Francisco Bay Area including SF, Oakland, Berkeley and beyond.

blocs.description: Dons et distrib de masques FFP2, réduction des risques aéroportés, autodéfense sanitaire (Covid et +).

blocs.description: Mutual aid project to distribute free KN95 + N95 masks (and tests when available) in Belchertown/Western MA. DM us on Instagram or email btownmaskbloc@proton.me to request free masks & tests or ask us to share your mask-required event!

blocs.name: Prairie Solidarity
blocs.description: Free N95s and Kn95s, informational zines. We will ship these to anyone in ND. We are hoping to have free tests and air purifier rentals in the near future.

blocs.name: Aberdeen Mask Bloc
blocs.description: Free masks, zines and covid info. Small supply of air purifiers for loan. Enquiries/requests (e.g for air purifier loans or to see what range of masks we currently have available) see email in linktree. Small mask bloc running on crip time.

blocs.name: People's Filter
blocs.description: Borrow HEPA air purifiers for free, no questions asked. Abolitionist project for disability justice, connecting folks to other free resources, mask-required events, and mutual aid in so-called Philadelphia.

blocs.name: Mask Bloc Denver
blocs.description: Free masks, tests, air purifier loans, and more to protect against airborne hazards on hinono’eino’ biito’owu’, Núu-agha-tʉvʉ-pʉ̱, Očhéthi Šakówiŋ, Tsétsėhéstȧhese/Tsitsistas/Só’taeo’o land (“Denver” Metro Area) and beyond. Respiradores, preubas de COVID/gripe, préstamos de purificador de aire gratis y más para protegerse de peligros transmiten por el aire en la tierra indígena de hinono’eino’ biito’owu’, Núu-agha-tʉvʉ-pʉ̱, Očhéthi Šakówiŋ, Tsétsėhéstȧhese/Tsitsistas/Só’taeo’o (el área metropolitana de 'Denver') y más allá.

blocs.name: Mendo Clean Air Club
blocs.description: Free N95/Kn95, rapid covid tests, and air purifier loans. We provide these across Mendocino County, including Ukiah, Willits, Fort Bragg, Gualala, and all other areas as well.

blocs.name: Mask Bloc West
blocs.description: anarchist antifascist mutual aid. free respirators from stolen Wurundjeri and Boonwurrung country posted to anywhere in so-called 'australia'. pick up free masks and zines in person from angliss neighbourhood house, 2/11 vipoint street, footscray. email us for larger local requests maskblocwest@protonmail.com.

blocs.name: Mask Bloc Bordeaux
blocs.description: Dons de masques FFP2 (divers modèles), flyers, prêt de purificateurs, nous sommes disponibles pour faire des interventions en évènements ou discuter pour partager des ressources sur l'autodéfense sanitaire/l'accessibilité en général !

blocs.name: Mask Bloc Montpellier

blocs.description: Collectif d’aide mutuelle et d’autodéfense sanitaire dédié à la distribution de masques à Paris et en banlieue parisienne. Pour obtenir des masques gratuitement, tu peux remplir notre formulaire et on fera de notre mieux pour répondre à ta demande !

blocs.name: Santa Barbara Mask Bloc
blocs.description: We provide free high quality masks and tests (when available) as well as educational materials about the ongoing risks of COVID. We can do local drop offs (Santa Barbara, Goleta, Carpinteria and the wider Santa Barbara and Ventura counties) of supplies as requested. Contact us via email or instagram if you’re in the 805 area and would like us to table at your events or provide educational outreach.Email: sbmaskbloc@proton.org

blocs.name: Mask Bloc Buffalo
blocs.description: Queer-/trans-informed community healthcare providing free quality face masks, COVID-19 tests, and additional resources in the Buffalo/WNY area 😷❤️🦬

blocs.name: 816 Covid Crew
blocs.location: Kansas City, KS / Kansas City, MO (Kansas / Missouri)
blocs.description: 816 COVID Crew is a nonhierarchical mutual aid project¹ started in early 2024. We are organizing to build solidarity and redistribute resources among residents of the greater “Kansas City” metro area. This is in response both to the ongoing COVID-19 pandemic and in preparation for future crises.
